## UserLibrary.IUserLibraryCreateParams interface

Parameters for creating a [UserLibrary](./ts-chocolate.userlibrary.userlibrary.md)<!-- -->.

User libraries have no built-in data - all data is user-provided.

Sources are processed in order: 1. File tree sources (in array order) 2. Pre-instantiated libraries (merged in)

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface IUserLibraryCreateParams 
```
